cases.prompt: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley city or its immediate unincorporated vicinity with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality, and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres.

failures.message: SQL did not match required pattern: (quality_codes|match_reasons)
row 1 parcel P76885 did not include low-quality improvement evidence.
row 2 parcel P37479 did not include low-quality improvement evidence.
row 3 parcel P37434 did not include low-quality improvement evidence.

action_plan: Add the required SQL construct from the eval case, or remove that expectation if it is not truly required.

cases.next_action: Add the required SQL construct from the eval case, or remove that expectation if it is not truly required.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH low_quality_improvements AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(i.ParcelNumber) AS parcel_number
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet') AS i
  WHERE TRIM(i.imprv_det_class_cd) = 'MSL'
),
sedro_woolley_parcels AS (
  SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.acres
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
  WHERE (LOWER(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR LOWER(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
    AND ps.acres BETWEEN 1 AND 3
)
SELECT swp.parcel_number
FROM sedro_woolley_parcels AS swp
JOIN low_quality_improvements AS lqi ON swp.parcel_number = lqi.parcel_number
cases.title: Sedro-Woolley Area Parcels with Low Quality Residential Dwellings and 1-3 Acres
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley city or immediate unincorporated vicinity, with existing low quality residential dwellings, and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres.

generation_attempts.error: The query must read from allowed R2 parquet files with read_parquet().
